Verified Petition For Order Determining Trust Asset
Off Calendar Apr-04-2018 Continued To Apr-09-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Verified Petition For Order Determining Trust Asset
Off Calendar Mar-05-2018 Continued To Apr-04-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gail Jackson-McCray, for and with petitioner David B. Crenshaw Sr.

The Court inquired why the matter should remin venued in San Francisco as the Trustee is not a San Francisco resident. Ms. Jackson-McCray responded that the petition was filed here as the property subject to the trust is located here and the predecessor trustee resided here; Mr. Crenshaw is merely fillling the vacancy that was created when the prior trustee passed away. She stated that Mr. Crwnshaw's sister was not an heir-at-law of the trust grantor as she is related by marriage only, and was not named as an heir in the will or as a beneficiary under the trust. Mr. Crenshaw stated that nothing was transferred to Claudette Crenshaw other than the home. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung. (Not reported)
